ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the time series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time series */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the time series data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the series started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the series ended or will end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., QUARTERLY, MONTHLY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the period in days, weeks, months, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., MICRO, MACRO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Auto.Arima, BSTS, ETS, THETA, BEA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method */,
  "v1" REAL /* Value 1 of the time series data */,
  "v2" REAL /* Value 2 of the time series data */,
  "v3" REAL /* Value 3 of the time series data */,
  "v4" REAL /* Value 4 of the time series data */,
  "v5" REAL /* Value 5 of the time series data */,
  "v6" REAL /* Value 6 of the time series data */,
  "v7" REAL /* Value 7 of the time series data */,
  "v8" REAL /* Value 8 of the time series data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the data point */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "forecast_length" TEXT /* Length of the forecast period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., alpha, beta) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was set */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_values" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasted value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data */,
  "forecasted_value" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_values" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* Date of the actual value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the actual value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Error value */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)
